title: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
excerpt: We’re introducing new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber.
content_html:
Jul 21, 2026

|

Our newest Gemini models deliver the efficiency, latency, and reliability to build AI agents at scale.

Developers and customers building production AI agents need higher token efficiency, lower latency, and more reliable performance. Our Flash series of models is built to meet the sweet spot of efficiency and quality to enable scaling agentic workflows. Building on Gemini 3.5 Flash, we’re introducing new Gemini models:

  • 3.6 Flash: Our workhorse model that delivers better coding, knowledge work, and multimodal performance. According to the Artificial Analysis Index, it reduces output token usage by 17% compared to 3.5 Flash, and in some benchmarks like DeepSWE by Datacurve, we observe up to 65%, all at a lower cost per output token.
  • 3.5 Flash-Lite: Our fastest, most cost-effective 3.5-class model, delivering 350 output tokens per second according to the Artificial Analysis Index, also significantly outperforming prior Flash-Lite generations in agentic workflows.
  • 3.5 Flash Cyber in CodeMender: Successful cybersecurity applications require careful orchestration of a model alongside an agent infrastructure. We’re introducing a combination of a new, highly efficient, specialized cyber-focused model paired with our CodeMender code security agent that delivers competitive performance at the frontier.

Beyond today’s releases, Gemini 3.5 Pro is currently testing with partners and we plan to make it broadly available as soon as it’s ready. In parallel, our team is already focusing on building the next generation of models. We have started our most ambitious pre-training run yet, for Gemini 4, and are excited by the progress.

3.6 Flash: More efficient and better quality than 3.5 Flash

Gemini 3.6 Flash builds directly on developer and customer feedback from 3.5 Flash. 3.6 Flash not only delivers a step up in coding and knowledge work, but it does this while meaningfully improving token efficiency. For example, on the Artificial Analysis Index, we see 3.6 Flash consuming 17% fewer output tokens than 3.5 Flash. It also takes fewer reasoning steps and tool calls to accomplish multi-step workflows.

This enhanced efficiency is also combined with a lower price than 3.5 Flash. At $1.50/1M input tokens and $7.50/1M output tokens, 3.6 Flash reduces the overall cost per agentic task, making agents more cost-effective to build and run.

3.6 Flash shows better token efficiency and reduced verbosity than 3.5 Flash in an OSWorld verified task (API)

Even while being more efficient, 3.6 Flash sees performance gains compared to 3.5 Flash across use cases:

  • 3.6 Flash delivers higher precision with fewer unwanted code edits and reduced execution loops, as seen in DeepSWE (49% vs. 37%), and shows significant improvement in ML Research, as seen in MLE Bench (63.9% vs. 49.7%).
  • It has improved computer use capabilities as seen in OSWorld-Verified (83.0% vs. 78.4%). Computer use is now a built-in client side tool via the Gemini API and Gemini Enterprise.
  • It outperforms 3.5 Flash in knowledge work, as shown by benchmarks like GDPval-AA v2 (1421 vs. 1349). Customers like Hebbia and Harvey have found it particularly capable at multimodal tasks like document parsing, chart and data analysis, and report drafting.

Customers report 3.6 Flash is a step forward in both cost and quality, balancing token efficiency, accuracy, and speed across complex workflows and knowledge-based tasks:

Built with safety

3.6 Flash is shipping with enhanced Frontier Safety safeguards in the domains of Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear (CBRN) and cyber offense misuses. These safeguards make the model substantially more resistant to jailbreaks. At the same time, the model has been trained to minimize refusals for beneficial uses.

For more information, see the 3.6 Flash model card.

3.5 Flash-Lite: Built to scale agentic workflows

Beyond Flash, we’re also releasing Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite, designed for both low-latency tasks and tasks where high throughput is critical for developers workflows, like agentic search and document processing.

3.5 Flash-Lite is the fastest model in the 3.5 series. As measured by Artificial Analysis, it runs at 350 output tokens/s. Priced at $0.3/1M input tokens and $2.5/1M output tokens and with significantly better quality than 3.1 Flash-Lite, 3.5 Flash-Lite offers a strong price-to-performance ratio for developers and customers running high throughput production traffic.

3.5 Flash-Lite executes high volume tasks at a lower latency than 3.5 Flash.

3.5 Flash-Lite enables efficient scaling for agentic systems. Across thinking levels, the model significantly outperforms 3.1 Flash-Lite. Depending on the workload, developers can configure the model to prioritize low-latency, low-cost execution for high-volume tasks with the minimal and low thinking levels, or engage higher thinking levels to process multi-step subagent workloads. The model now also has computer use as a built-in tool to reliably support these agentic tasks across surfaces.

It’s a significant step up in coding and agentic tasks as seen in Terminal-Bench 2.1 (54% vs 31%), long context as seen in GDM-MRCR v2 (72.2% vs. 60.1%), and real-world task execution as seen in GDPval-AA v2 (1140 vs. 642).

In fact, on many agentic and coding evals, 3.5 Flash-Lite even outperforms 3 Flash, including on SWE-Bench Pro (54.2% vs. 49.6%) and OSWorld-Verified (74.0% vs. 65.1%), making it a faster & more capable option for workloads on both 2.5 and 3 Flash.

Early customers of 3.5 Flash-Lite are highlighting its unique combination of speed, intelligence, and cost efficiency for scaling agentic workflows and data processing tasks:

For more information about the model, see the 3.5 Flash-Lite model card.

3.5 Flash Cyber in CodeMender: finding and fixing vulnerabilities efficiently

AI models have become capable of finding security vulnerabilities faster than current systems can fix them. Tackling this growing threat requires an approach to securing software that is highly capable and efficient.

Flash’s performance and efficiency makes it an ideal foundation to detect, validate, and patch code security issues at scale. Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber is built on top of 3.5 Flash, and fine-tuned for finding and fixing cybersecurity vulnerabilities at a lower price per token than larger models.

Within CodeMender, which uses multiple 3.5 Flash Cyber agents working together to produce a single combined report, 3.5 Flash Cyber reaches competitive performance at the frontier on the popular benchmark CyberGym.

Given the dual-use nature of this technology, we have taken an intentional approach to deploying 3.5 Flash Cyber. The model will be exclusively available to governments and trusted partners via CodeMender soon as part of a limited-access pilot program. This will give frontline defenders a head start in finding and fixing critical vulnerabilities before they can be exploited, while mitigating against broader misuse.

3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite: Get started today

3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite are available starting today:

  • For developers in the Gemini API via Google AI Studio and Android Studio. 3.6 Flash is also available in Google Antigravity. Get started with the Developer Guide.
  • For enterprises in Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. 3.6 Flash is also available in the Gemini Enterprise app.
  • For everyone via the Gemini app. 3.5 Flash-Lite is also rolling out in Google Search.

As you start building with 3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite, we welcome your feedback to improve future Gemini models and look forward to releasing 3.5 Pro soon.

Get the latest news from Google in your inbox

Sign up for our newsletters with product updates, event information, special offers, and more.

Your information will be used in accordance with Google's privacy policy. You may opt out at any time.

sentences.zh: 在 Gemini 3.5 Flash 的基础上，我们推出了新的 Gemini 型号：

blocks.html_en: • 3.6 Flash: Our workhorse model that delivers better coding, knowledge work, and multimodal performance. sentences.en: According to the Artificial Analysis Index, it reduces output token usage by 17% compared to 3.5 Flash, and in some benchmarks like DeepSWE by Datacurve, we observe up to 65%, all at a lower cost per output token.
sentences.zh: 根据人工分析指数，与 3.5 Flash 相比，它减少了 17% 的输出代币使用量，并且在 Datacurve 的 DeepSWE 等一些基准测试中，我们观察到高达 65%，而且每个输出代币的成本更低。

blocks.html_en: • 3.5 Flash-Lite: Our fastest, most cost-effective 3.5-class model, delivering 350 output tokens per second according to the Artificial Analysis Index, also significantly outperforming prior Flash-Lite generations in agentic workflows.

sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash-Lite：我们最快、最具成本效益的 3.5 级模型，根据人工分析指数每秒提供 350 个输出令牌，在代理工作流程中也显着优于前几代 Flash-Lite。

blocks.html_en: • 3.5 Flash Cyber in CodeMender: Successful cybersecurity applications require careful orchestration of a model alongside an agent infrastructure. We’re introducing a combination of a new, highly efficient, specialized cyber-focused model paired with our CodeMender code security agent that delivers competitive performance at the frontier.

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash Cyber in CodeMender: Successful cybersecurity applications require careful orchestration of a model alongside an agent infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 3.5 CodeMender 中的 Flash Cyber​​：成功的网络安全应用程序需要仔细编排模型以及代理基础设施。

sentences.en: We’re introducing a combination of a new, highly efficient, specialized cyber-focused model paired with our CodeMender code security agent that delivers competitive performance at the frontier.
sentences.zh: 我们引入了一种新的、高效的、专门的以网络为中心的模型，与我们的 CodeMender 代码安全代理相结合，可在前沿提供具有竞争力的性能。

sentences.zh: 我们已经开始为 Gemini 4 进行迄今为止最雄心勃勃的预训练，并对进展感到兴奋。

sentences.en: As measured by Artificial Analysis, it runs at 350 output tokens/s.
sentences.zh: 根据人工分析的测量，它的运行速度为 350 个输出令牌/秒。

sentences.en: Priced at $0.3/1M input tokens and $2.5/1M output tokens and with significantly better quality than 3.1 Flash-Lite, 3.5 Flash-Lite offers a strong price-to-performance ratio for developers and customers running high throughput production traffic.
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash-Lite 的输入令牌价格为 0.3 美元/100 万美元，输出令牌为 2.5 美元/100 万美元，其质量明显优于 3.1 Flash-Lite，为运行高吞吐量生产流量的开发人员和客户提供了强大的性价比。

blocks.html_en: 3.5 Flash-Lite executes high volume tasks at a lower latency than 3.5 Flash.

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash-Lite executes high volume tasks at a lower latency than 3.5 Flash.
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash-Lite 能够以比 3.5 Flash 更低的延迟执行大量任务。

blocks.html_en: 3.5 Flash-Lite enables efficient scaling for agentic systems. Across thinking levels, the model significantly outperforms 3.1 Flash-Lite. Depending on the workload, developers can configure the model to prioritize low-latency, low-cost execution for high-volume tasks with the minimal and low thinking levels, or engage higher thinking levels to process multi-step subagent workloads. The model now also has computer use as a built-in tool to reliably support these agentic tasks across surfaces.

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash-Lite enables efficient scaling for agentic systems.
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash-Lite 可实现代理系统的高效扩展。

sentences.en: Across thinking levels, the model significantly outperforms 3.1 Flash-Lite.
sentences.zh: 在思维层面上，该模型明显优于 3.1 Flash-Lite。

sentences.en: Depending on the workload, developers can configure the model to prioritize low-latency, low-cost execution for high-volume tasks with the minimal and low thinking levels, or engage higher thinking levels to process multi-step subagent workloads.
sentences.zh: 根据工作负载，开发人员可以配置模型，以最低和较低的思维水平优先处理大批量任务的低延迟、低成本执行，或者采用更高的思维水平来处理多步骤子代理工作负载。

sentences.en: The model now also has computer use as a built-in tool to reliably support these agentic tasks across surfaces.
sentences.zh: 该模型现在还使用计算机作为内置工具来可靠地支持这些跨表面的代理任务。

blocks.html_en: It’s a significant step up in coding and agentic tasks as seen in Terminal-Bench 2.1 (54% vs 31%), long context as seen in GDM-MRCR v2 (72.2% vs. 60.1%), and real-world task execution as seen in GDPval-AA v2 (1140 vs. 642).

sentences.en: It’s a significant step up in coding and agentic tasks as seen in Terminal-Bench 2.1 (54% vs 31%), long context as seen in GDM-MRCR v2 (72.2% vs. 60.1%), and real-world task execution as seen in GDPval-AA v2 (1140 vs. 642).
sentences.zh: 这是在编码和代理任务方面的重大进步，如 Terminal-Bench 2.1 中所示（54% vs 31%）、长上下文如 GDM-MRCR v2 中所示（72.2% vs. 60.1%），以及实际任务执行如 GDPval-AA v2 中所示（1140 vs 642）。

blocks.html_en: In fact, on many agentic and coding evals, 3.5 Flash-Lite even outperforms 3 Flash, including on SWE-Bench Pro (54.2% vs. 49.6%) and OSWorld-Verified (74.0% vs. 65.1%), making it a faster & more capable option for workloads on both 2.5 and 3 Flash.

sentences.en: In fact, on many agentic and coding evals, 3.5 Flash-Lite even outperforms 3 Flash, including on SWE-Bench Pro (54.2% vs. 49.6%) and OSWorld-Verified (74.0% vs. 65.1%), making it a faster & more capable option for workloads on both 2.5 and 3 Flash.
sentences.zh: 事实上，在许多代理和编码评估中，3.5 Flash-Lite 甚至优于 3 Flash，包括在 SWE-Bench Pro（54.2% vs. 49.6%）和 OSWorld-Verified（74.0% vs. 65.1%）上，这使其成为 2.5 Flash 和 3 Flash 上工作负载的更快、更强大的选择。

blocks.html_en: Early customers of 3.5 Flash-Lite are highlighting its unique combination of speed, intelligence, and cost efficiency for scaling agentic workflows and data processing tasks:

sentences.en: Early customers of 3.5 Flash-Lite are highlighting its unique combination of speed, intelligence, and cost efficiency for scaling agentic workflows and data processing tasks:
sentences.zh: 3.5 Flash-Lite 的早期客户强调其速度、智能和成本效率的独特组合，可用于扩展代理工作流程和数据处理任务：

blocks.html_en: For more information about the model, see the 3.5 Flash-Lite model card.

sentences.en: For more information about the model, see the 3.5 Flash-Lite model card.
sentences.zh: 有关该型号的更多信息，请参阅 3.5 Flash-Lite 型号卡。

blocks.html_en: 3.5 Flash Cyber in CodeMender: finding and fixing vulnerabilities efficiently

sentences.en: 3.5 Flash Cyber in CodeMender: finding and fixing vulnerabilities efficiently
sentences.zh: 3.5 CodeMender 中的 Flash Cyber​​：高效查找和修复漏洞

blocks.html_en: AI models have become capable of finding security vulnerabilities faster than current systems can fix them. Tackling this growing threat requires an approach to securing software that is highly capable and efficient.

sentences.en: AI models have become capable of finding security vulnerabilities faster than current systems can fix them.
sentences.zh: 人工智能模型能够比当前系统修复安全漏洞的速度更快。

sentences.en: Tackling this growing threat requires an approach to securing software that is highly capable and efficient.
sentences.zh: 应对这一日益严重的威胁需要一种功能强大且高效的软件保护方法。

blocks.html_en: Flash’s performance and efficiency makes it an ideal foundation to detect, validate, and patch code security issues at scale. Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber is built on top of 3.5 Flash, and fine-tuned for finding and fixing cybersecurity vulnerabilities at a lower price per token than larger models.

sentences.en: Flash’s performance and efficiency makes it an ideal foundation to detect, validate, and patch code security issues at scale.
sentences.zh: Flash 的性能和效率使其成为大规模检测、验证和修补代码安全问题的理想基础。

sentences.en: Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber is built on top of 3.5 Flash, and fine-tuned for finding and fixing cybersecurity vulnerabilities at a lower price per token than larger models.
sentences.zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 构建于 3.5 Flash 之上，并进行了微调，以比大型型号更低的每个代币价格查找和修复网络安全漏洞。

blocks.html_en: Within CodeMender, which uses multiple 3.5 Flash Cyber agents working together to produce a single combined report, 3.5 Flash Cyber reaches competitive performance at the frontier on the popular benchmark CyberGym.

sentences.en: Within CodeMender, which uses multiple 3.5 Flash Cyber agents working together to produce a single combined report, 3.5 Flash Cyber reaches competitive performance at the frontier on the popular benchmark CyberGym.
sentences.zh: 在 CodeMender 中，它使用多个 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 代理一起工作来生成单个组合报告，3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 在流行的基准 Cyber​​Gym 上达到了前沿的竞争性能。

blocks.html_en: Given the dual-use nature of this technology, we have taken an intentional approach to deploying 3.5 Flash Cyber. The model will be exclusively available to governments and trusted partners via CodeMender soon as part of a limited-access pilot program. This will give frontline defenders a head start in finding and fixing critical vulnerabilities before they can be exploited, while mitigating against broader misuse.

sentences.en: Given the dual-use nature of this technology, we have taken an intentional approach to deploying 3.5 Flash Cyber.
sentences.zh: 鉴于该技术的双重用途性质，我们特意采取了部署 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 的方法。

sentences.en: The model will be exclusively available to governments and trusted partners via CodeMender soon as part of a limited-access pilot program.
sentences.zh: 作为有限访问试点计划的一部分，该模型很快将通过 CodeMender 专门提供给政府和值得信赖的合作伙伴。

sentences.en: This will give frontline defenders a head start in finding and fixing critical vulnerabilities before they can be exploited, while mitigating against broader misuse.
sentences.zh: 这将使一线防御者在关键漏洞被利用之前抢先发现并修复这些漏洞，同时减少更广泛的滥用。

sentences.zh: Gemini Enterprise 应用程序中也提供了 3.6 Flash。

sentences.en: For everyone via the Gemini app.
sentences.zh: 通过 Gemini 应用程序为每个人提供。

content_html_zh:
Jul 21, 2026

|

我们最新的 Gemini 模型提供了大规模构建 AI 代理所需的效率、延迟和可靠性。

构建生产型人工智能代理的开发人员和客户需要更高的代币效率、更低的延迟和更可靠的性能。 我们的 Flash 系列模型旨在满足效率和质量的最佳点，以实现扩展代理工作流程。 在 Gemini 3.5 Flash 的基础上，我们推出了新的 Gemini 型号：

  • 3.6 Flash：我们的主力模型，可提供更好的编码、知识工作和多模式性能。 根据人工分析指数，与 3.5 Flash 相比，它减少了 17% 的输出代币使用量，并且在 Datacurve 的 DeepSWE 等一些基准测试中，我们观察到高达 65%，而且每个输出代币的成本更低。
  • 3.5 Flash-Lite：我们最快、最具成本效益的 3.5 级模型，根据人工分析指数每秒提供 350 个输出令牌，在代理工作流程中也显着优于前几代 Flash-Lite。
  • 3.5 CodeMender 中的 Flash Cyber​​：成功的网络安全应用程序需要仔细编排模型以及代理基础设施。 我们引入了一种新的、高效的、专门的以网络为中心的模型，与我们的 CodeMender 代码安全代理相结合，可在前沿提供具有竞争力的性能。

除了今天的发布之外，Gemini 3.5 Pro 目前正在与合作伙伴进行测试，我们计划在准备就绪后立即广泛提供。 与此同时，我们的团队已经专注于构建下一代模型。 我们已经开始为 Gemini 4 进行迄今为止最雄心勃勃的预训练，并对进展感到兴奋。

3.6 Flash：比3.5 Flash效率更高、质量更好

Gemini 3.6 Flash 直接基于开发人员和客户对 3.5 Flash 的反馈构建。 3.6 Flash 不仅在编码和知识工作方面取得了进步，而且在有意义地提高了代币效率的同时。 例如，在人工分析指数上，我们看到 3.6 Flash 消耗的输出令牌比 3.5 Flash 少 17%。 它还需要更少的推理步骤和工具调用来完成多步骤工作流程。

这种更高的效率还与比 3.5 闪存更低的价格相结合。 3.6 Flash 的输入令牌为 1.50 美元/100 万美元，输出令牌为 7.50 美元/100 万美元，降低了每个代理任务的总体成本，使代理的构建和运行更具成本效益。

在 OSWorld 验证的任务 (API) 中，3.6 Flash 显示出比 3.5 Flash 更好的令牌效率并减少了冗长

尽管效率更高，但与 3.5 闪存相比，3.6 闪存在各种用例中的性能都有所提高：

  • 3.6 Flash 提供了更高的精度，减少了不必要的代码编辑并减少了执行循环，如 DeepSWE 所示（49% vs. 37%），并且在 ML 研究中显示出显着改进，如 MLE Bench 所示（63.9% vs. 49.7%）。
  • 正如 OSWorld 验证所示，它提高了计算机使用能力（83.0% 对比 78.4%）。 计算机使用现在是通过 Gemini API 和 Gemini Enterprise 的内置客户端工具。
  • 正如 GDPval-AA v2 等基准测试所示（1421 vs. 1349），它在知识工作中的表现优于 3.5 Flash。 Hebbia 和 Harvey 等客户发现它特别适合执行文档解析、图表和数据分析以及报告起草等多模式任务。

客户报告 3.6 Flash 在成本和质量方面都向前迈出了一步，在复杂的工作流程和基于知识的任务中平衡了令牌效率、准确性和速度：

安全建造

3.6 Flash 在化学、生物、放射和核 (CBRN) 和网络犯罪滥用领域配备了增强的边境安全保障措施。 这些保护措施使模型更能抵抗越狱。 与此同时，该模型经过训练，可以最大限度地减少对有益用途的拒绝。

有关详细信息，请参阅 3.6 闪存型号卡。

3.5 Flash-Lite：专为扩展代理工作流程而构建

除了 Flash 之外，我们还发布了 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite，专为低延迟任务和高吞吐量对开发人员工作流程至关重要的任务（例如代理搜索和文档处理）而设计。

3.5 Flash-Lite 是 3.5 系列中最快的型号。 根据人工分析的测量，它的运行速度为 350 个输出令牌/秒。 3.5 Flash-Lite 的输入令牌价格为 0.3 美元/100 万美元，输出令牌为 2.5 美元/100 万美元，其质量明显优于 3.1 Flash-Lite，为运行高吞吐量生产流量的开发人员和客户提供了强大的性价比。

3.5 Flash-Lite 能够以比 3.5 Flash 更低的延迟执行大量任务。

3.5 Flash-Lite 可实现代理系统的高效扩展。 在思维层面上，该模型明显优于 3.1 Flash-Lite。 根据工作负载，开发人员可以配置模型，以最低和较低的思维水平优先处理大批量任务的低延迟、低成本执行，或者采用更高的思维水平来处理多步骤子代理工作负载。 该模型现在还使用计算机作为内置工具来可靠地支持这些跨表面的代理任务。

这是在编码和代理任务方面的重大进步，如 Terminal-Bench 2.1 中所示（54% vs 31%）、长上下文如 GDM-MRCR v2 中所示（72.2% vs. 60.1%），以及实际任务执行如 GDPval-AA v2 中所示（1140 vs 642）。

事实上，在许多代理和编码评估中，3.5 Flash-Lite 甚至优于 3 Flash，包括在 SWE-Bench Pro（54.2% vs. 49.6%）和 OSWorld-Verified（74.0% vs. 65.1%）上，这使其成为 2.5 Flash 和 3 Flash 上工作负载的更快、更强大的选择。

3.5 Flash-Lite 的早期客户强调其速度、智能和成本效率的独特组合，可用于扩展代理工作流程和数据处理任务：

有关该型号的更多信息，请参阅 3.5 Flash-Lite 型号卡。

3.5 CodeMender 中的 Flash Cyber​​：高效查找和修复漏洞

人工智能模型能够比当前系统修复安全漏洞的速度更快。 应对这一日益严重的威胁需要一种功能强大且高效的软件保护方法。

Flash 的性能和效率使其成为大规模检测、验证和修补代码安全问题的理想基础。 Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 构建于 3.5 Flash 之上，并进行了微调，以比大型型号更低的每个代币价格查找和修复网络安全漏洞。

在 CodeMender 中，它使用多个 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 代理一起工作来生成单个组合报告，3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 在流行的基准 Cyber​​Gym 上达到了前沿的竞争性能。

鉴于该技术的双重用途性质，我们特意采取了部署 3.5 Flash Cyber​​ 的方法。 作为有限访问试点计划的一部分，该模型很快将通过 CodeMender 专门提供给政府和值得信赖的合作伙伴。 这将使一线防御者在关键漏洞被利用之前抢先发现并修复这些漏洞，同时减少更广泛的滥用。

3.6 Flash 和 3.5 Flash-Lite：立即开始

3.6 Flash 和 3.5 Flash-Lite 即日起上市：

  • 适用于通过 Google AI Studio 和 Android Studio 使用 Gemini API 的开发人员。 3.6 Flash 也可在 Google Antigravity 中使用。 开始使用开发人员指南。
  • 适用于Gemini企业代理平台的企业。 Gemini Enterprise 应用程序中也提供了 3.6 Flash。
  • 通过 Gemini 应用程序为每个人提供。 3.5 Flash-Lite 也在 Google 搜索中推出。

当您开始使用 3.6 Flash 和 3.5 Flash-Lite 进行构建时，我们欢迎您提供反馈以改进未来的 Gemini 模型，并期待很快发布 3.5 Pro。

您的信息将根据 Google 的隐私政策使用。 您可以随时选择退出。
